hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.env* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *credentials* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *secret* ]]; then echo "Blocked: refusing to write to sensitive file $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

Q="$HOME/.claude/plugins/data/flow/contributions/queue"; if [ -f .claude-plugin/marketplace.json ] && [ -d "$Q" ]; then N=$(grep -l '"status": "queued"' "$Q"/*.json 2>/dev/null | grep -c .); if [ "$N" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[flow] $N queued lesson-contribution(s) in the harvest queue — run /flow:contribute to drain them into a draft PR."; fi; fi; exit 0
